utility_evaluation.REASONING:
Required format includes 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes entries for all 5. Now check if each is fully specified with required details:
- health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Provided: physical plan name, benefits, cost; mental plan name, benefits, cost; and a total. Fully specified.
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. Provided: “Not included...”, no costs or details. Not specified.
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. Provided: “Not included...”, no costs or details. Not specified.
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. Provided: two add-ons with descriptions and costs, plus combined total. Fully specified.
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Provided: monthly total and breakdown by category; no annual figure, but still a complete monthly breakdown. Accept as specified.
Therefore, 3 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes two items by name: LifeFirst Standard Plan for physical health and LifeFirst Standard Plan for mental health, plus two add-ons named Gym Membership Reimbursement and Wellness Programs. From the ground-truth ratings: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) has rating 9 under primary_health_coverage.physical_health. LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health) has rating 9 under primary_health_coverage.mental_health. Gym Membership Reimbursement has rating 4 under health_enhancement_services. Wellness Programs has rating 3 under health_enhancement_services.
